title: Prompt & Prefix Tuning
content:
# Prompt & Prefix Tuning

*   **Prompt Tuning:** Adds virtual tokens to sequence inputs: $\mathbf{X}_{tuned} = [\mathbf{P}_{embed}; \mathbf{X}]$.
*   **Prefix Tuning:** Prepend continuous key-value states to attention computation steps: $\mathbf{K}_{new} = [\mathbf{P}_K; \mathbf{K}]$.
